title: A star-like orange UFO spotted in Curitiba [2000]
content:
JAN 23rd, 2000. Time: 12:14 pm. Duration: 15 minutes. In the town of Rebouças, Curitiba, State of Paraná, two witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object shaped like a “dot” and colored “orange”. The reported UFO had the appearance of a “star”, alternating movements and stops. According to the witnesses, the sky was partially cloudy and the object, at the end of its appearance, went to the West. For the COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] the observer of the phenomenon further stated that: “The light disappeared between the clouds while standing still and then reappeared, moving West and disappeared after a few minutes.”

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.572. “Relatório de confirmação de avistamento no bairro de Rebouças em Curitiba, Paraná”. Brasília, DF. 1952 a 2015. Último acesso realizado em 27/05/2020.

The BRAZILIAN UFO ARCHIVES website is a private initiative and IS NOT endorsed or sponsored by the Arquivo Nacional do Brasil [see our ‘Info’ page]. *THE ORIGINAL FILE WITH THE CASE REFERRED TO IN THIS TEXT CAN BE FOUND IN THE DOCUMENTAL COLLECTION OF “ARQUIVO NACIONAL DO BRASIL, LOCATED IN THE “OBJETO VOADOR NÃO IDENTIFICADO (OVNI)” FUND, UNDER THE REFERENCE CODE [“Código de Referência”] MENTIONED ABOVE.
